pi_items.source: Verified through web search: SPY is a real publicly traded ETF on NYSEARCA

Verified in actual SPY data file (/examples/ninja_trader_env/data/SPY.Last.txt). Price level $420 appeared on 2023-10-03 (421.59), 2023-10-20 (421.19), 2023-10-23 (420.46), 2023-10-26 (421.08). Range is within 2023-2024 training data.
Directly stated in task description: 'The price levels should be as close to $450.00 and $420.00 as possible (within ±$5 tolerance)'. Also specified in verifier.py line 33: TOLERANCE = 5.0
Web search for NinjaTrader 8 documentation (forum.ninjatrader.com, ninjatrader.com/support) confirms default workspace location. Docker is the configured username in env.json.

Verified in multiple sources: 1) Configured in task.json metadata, 2) Referenced in export_result.ps1 line 5, 3) Setup script (setup_ninjatrader.ps1 line 19) creates the NinjaTraderTasks directory on Desktop
Verified by reading /examples/ninja_trader_env/env.json line 2: id field matches exactly

pi_items.metadata_value: real Yahoo Finance data (SPY, AAPL, MSFT 2023-2024)
pi_items.verified_value: Real market OHLCV data from 2023-2024 in SPY.Last.txt, AAPL.Last.txt, MSFT.Last.txt
pi_items.source: Verified by: 1) env.json description line 6, 2) Actual data files present at /examples/ninja_trader_env/data/ with dates ranging from 20230103 to 20241231, 3) Data format matches standard OHLCV: Date;Open;High;Low;Close;Volume

pi_items.metadata_value: Both $450 and $420 are realistic price levels for SPY daily chart
pi_items.source: Analysis of SPY.Last.txt data file: 1) SPY daily range 2023-2024 spans from ~377.83 (Jan 2023) to ~607.91 (Dec 2024), 2) Both target prices fall well within historical range of training data, 3) $450 level was active in July-August 2023, 4) $420 level was active in October 2023

privileged_info_summary: The task targets SPY (SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust), a real publicly traded instrument. The price levels $450.00 and $420.00 are verified as realistic values that occurred in the training dataset (Yahoo Finance OHLCV data from 2023-2024). The tolerance of ±$5 is explicitly defined in both task description and verifier code. The NinjaTrader 8 workspace directory path (C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces) conforms to standard NinjaTrader 8 installation patterns. Result files are configured to save to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\NinjaTraderTasks. The environment and task IDs are correctly cross-referenced and the task operates on real historical market data.
